{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

    "RX.1": 5,

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
